createAccount.heading: Sign up for Stream
createAccount.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
createAccount.successToast: Your account has been created successfully. Please verify your email to complete registration.
createAccount.errorToast: Registration failed. Please try again or contact support.
createAccount.successDescription: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
createAccount.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in

verify.heading: Verify Your Account
verify.description: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verify.errorMessage: Please try again later or contact support.

login.heading: Log in to TeaStream
login.backButtonLabel: Don't have an account? Sign up!
login.pinDescription: Enter the code from your app for authentication.
login.loginDescription: Your name or email that you entered during registration.

resetPassword.heading: Reset Password
resetPassword.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
resetPassword.emailDescription: Your email address used during registration.
resetPassword.successAlertDescription: We sent a password reset link to your email. If Telegram notifications are enabled, the link has also been sent there.

newPassword.heading: New Password
newPassword.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
newPassword.passwordRepeatDescription: Repeat your new password for confirmation.
